name: size_bucket_counter
description: Count regions in a binary mask and classify each by area into small / medium / large buckets.

params.name: close_radius
params.doc: Morphological close radius applied to the mask before labelling. Keep small (1-2) so adjacent small circles don't merge.

params.name: min_area
params.doc: Areas below this are treated as noise and dropped (rejected_small).

params.name: small_max
params.doc: Upper bound (exclusive) of the SMALL bucket. Sit in the gap between max small area (~201) and min medium area (~380).

params.name: medium_max
params.doc: Upper bound (exclusive) of the MEDIUM bucket. Sit in the gap between max medium area (~615) and min large area (~1018).

params.name: max_area
params.doc: Areas above this are treated as merged blobs / artefacts and dropped (rejected_big).

outputs.name: count_small
outputs.doc: Number of regions classified as small.

outputs.name: count_medium
outputs.doc: Number of regions classified as medium.

outputs.name: count_large
outputs.doc: Number of regions classified as large.

outputs.name: total_regions
outputs.doc: Total connected components found before area filtering.

outputs.name: rejected_small
outputs.doc: Components with area < min_area (treated as noise).

outputs.name: rejected_big
outputs.doc: Components with area > max_area (treated as merged blobs).
